case_title: STAN TANGEMAN VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY TANGEMAN, STAN CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $NONE) SERVED JUL-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TANGEMAN, STAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM BOTH SIDES. CLERK: B. WILBER; NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H)
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANGEMAN, STAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO *** PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THE CCSF CREATED A "DANGEROUS CONDITION", WHICH WAS THE PROXIMATE CAUSE OF THE INJURIES SUSTAINED BY PLAINTIFF'S SON. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES ARE INADEQUATELY SUBSTANTIATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
